title: Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple
tagline: Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sowmyanarayana Perumal Temple is an ancient temple located in Thirukoshtiyur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu.
overview.description: Sowmyanarayana Perumal Temple is an ancient temple located in Thirukoshtiyur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Sowmyanarayana Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Thirumamagal. topPlaces.name: Eriyur
topPlaces.description: Eriyur is a village in Singampunari Taluk in Sivaganga district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a large village consisting of two Panchayat villages: Eriyur and Mampatti Devasthanam.

topPlaces.name: Mampatti
topPlaces.description: Mampatti is a village in Singampunari Taluk in Sivagangai District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Mampatti South panchayath union.

topPlaces.name: Kandiramanickkam, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vettangudi Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Vettangudi Bird Sanctuary is a 0.384 km2 (0.148 sq mi) protected area, declared in June 1977 near Thirupattur in the then Ramnad District and present day Sivaganga District that includes the periya kollukudi patti, chinna kollukudi patti, and vettangudi patti irrigation tanks. The heaviest rainfall occurs between October and December, when the northeast monsoon brings in 330–390 mm (13–15 in) of rainfall.

topPlaces.name: Kandramanickam
topPlaces.description: Kandramanickam is a village in Sivaganga district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Chokkanathapuram, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Chokkanathapuram is a small village in Sivaganga district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Jeyankondanilai
topPlaces.description: Jeyankondanilai is a head village in singampunari taluk, Sivaganga district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This village is predominantly Kallar village with a minor section of SC community and a couple of families of other castes.

items.note: Eriyur is a village in Singampunari Taluk in Sivaganga district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a large village consisting of two Panchayat villages: Eriyur and Mampatti Devasthanam.
Mampatti is a village in Singampunari Taluk in Sivagangai District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Mampatti South panchayath union.
Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

Vettangudi Bird Sanctuary is a 0.384 km2 (0.148 sq mi) protected area, declared in June 1977 near Thirupattur in the then Ramnad District and present day Sivaganga District that includes the periya kollukudi patti, chinna kollukudi patti, and vettangudi patti irrigation tanks. The heaviest rainfall occurs between October and December, when the northeast monsoon brings in 330–390 mm (13–15 in) of rainfall.
Kandramanickam is a village in Sivaganga district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
Chokkanathapuram is a small village in Sivaganga district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

Jeyankondanilai is a head village in singampunari taluk, Sivaganga district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This village is predominantly Kallar village with a minor section of SC community and a couple of families of other castes.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (51 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Eriyur, Mampatti, Kandiramanickkam, Tiruvarur, Vettangudi Bird Sanctuary, Kandramanickam.
